name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Real quick, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Tonight... | Derek --

I just walked offstage from my first forum with Donald Trump.

This was important because, as millions of people tuned in tonight, we know the election is moving into a new phase. We’re less than nine weeks away from Election Day, so we're using every opportunity to talk about the kind of future Americans deserve: one in which we’re fighting for each other -- and against bigotry and divisiveness.

The stakes are too high, and the alternative too dire for us to do otherwise. Especially because there just aren’t many moments like this left.

**So will you chip in right now to say that you have my back -- and that you’re fighting right alongside me, tonight and every moment through Election Day (and get your free sticker while you’re at it)?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0NDY5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMTM4OTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
You’re the best, Derek. Thanks for everything,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and join the 2.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY0NDY5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMTM4OTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37442103:WSXX22bNy:m:1:876315805:2D6646B9DAB586D2D11A4FBA8C80AB08:r)

Peter, I have no other choice but to ask for your help.

Now that Labor Day weekend has come and gone, we're in the final sprint towards Election Day.

[**Will you please chip in $25, $50, $100 or more immediately to fund our voter-turnout operations?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37442103:WSXX22bNy:m:1:876315805:2D6646B9DAB586D2D11A4FBA8C80AB08:r)

**We 've set a critical September fundraising goal of $30 million, and Peter, we need you to join our effort NOW if we're going to hit our mark.**

**[SUPPORT THE TRUMP VICTORY FUND](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37442103:WSXX22bNy:m:1:876315805:2D6646B9DAB586D2D11A4FBA8C80AB08:r)**

During the past year, my father has activated a movement of patriotic, pro-America voters all across the country.

This is a nationwide movement of proud citizens who are fed up with the failures, the lies and the cowardice of career politicians and D.C. insiders.

But the reality is that the presidential election will be decided in just a handful of 'swing states.'

While my father has spent his time growing businesses and creating jobs, Hillary Clinton has been laying the groundwork for this campaign for many, many years.

**Our team is growing fast! And to continue our momentum going into the final days of the campaign, we are launching a September Victory Fund to ramp up our get-out-the-vote operations in key states.**

**[SUPPORT THE TRUMP VICTORY FUND](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37442103:WSXX22bNy:m:1:876315805:2D6646B9DAB586D2D11A4FBA8C80AB08:r)**

For September, we're setting a $30 million online goal, and it's a big number but I know we'll hit it because proud citizens like you are NOT going to sit on the sidelines and watch Hillary Clinton stroll into the White House.

**Every dollar you donate will help us go toe-to-toe with the Obama-Clinton liberal voter turnout machine. Let 's win a Republican sweep up and down the ballot!**

Thank you!

Eric Trump

**P.S. I 'm going to give my father a list of everyone who donates to the Victory Fund today - launch day. I hope he sees your name towards the top of the list, Peter. Please don't wait.

[Donate now and be as generous as you can. Hillary Clinton is counting on her huge voter-turnout operation to carry her to victory. Working with you and other patriots, I know we can defeat her!](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37442103:WSXX22bNy:m:1:876315805:2D6646B9DAB586D2D11A4FBA8C80AB08:r)**

**[SUPPORT THE TRUMP VICTORY FUND](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37442103:WSXX22bNy:m:1:876315805:2D6646B9DAB586D2D11A4FBA8C80AB08:r)**

name: Ben Carson
subject: Please watch this:
body:
Peter,

Just this week, Reverend Franklin Graham said: "I'm not telling
people who to vote for, but I am telling Christians to vote. I
believe the election coming up in November is the most critical
in our lifetime -- so much hangs in the balance."

I couldn't agree more, which is why My Faith Votes is working
around the clock to inspire and mobilize Christians to vote in
2016. It's a very tall order, but every day is a step forward.

The next phase of our media plan is now underway and my request
today is very simple.

We must raise $200,000 to run 25 radio and 35 television Public
Service Announcements across the country. Doing so will allow us
to reach over 150 million households. We're making steady
progress towards our goal but we're just not there yet.

Here's one of our first television PSAs. Please watch it and
donate now to get it on the air.

www.myfaithvotes.org/psa/

The consequences of not voting will unfairly become our
children's and our grandchildren's burden. My work with My Faith
Votes is about doing everything in my power to make sure this
doesn't happen.

As an engaged supporter of mine, I probably don't have to explain
to you what's at stake in 2016. But there are millions of people
around the country that need that extra nudge.

That's the goal of these PSAs and I need your help to make sure
they are seen and heard.

www.myfaithvotes.org/psa/

Thank you for your commitment.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Donate: www.myfaithvotes.org/psa/

reserved

name: Marco Rubio
subject: ALERT: 60 DAYS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
Friend, we have just 60 days until the election and I need your immediate help.
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37457919:sT_C92bNQ:m:1:1405944196:EF8D12C626E1727B6A0AED2EAFE074FD:r)
---
Friend, this is the email I hoped I wouldn't have to write.

You see, with the election just 60 days away - I have no time to lose. **Unfortunately the polls are very close - and my very liberal opponent, Congressman Patrick Murphy has just received more financial help from his wealthy father.**

body:
Last night's forum | Derek --

Last night, Hillary and Trump took turns onstage, answering questions and laying out their platforms in the first national forum of the general election.

It was an important moment, full stop. This race is getting tighter, and with millions of people tuning in to this campaign for the first time, the candidates’ performances last night could make a difference -- **[Hillary needs to know you’ve got her back.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY0NDczMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMTU0MzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

As we enter the final leg of the race, and as the clock ticks down to the first presidential debate in less than three weeks, I’ve never been more certain that our team has what it takes to come out on top in November.

Why? Because I know our candidate. I know Hillary’s resilience, her vision for our nation’s future, and her dedication to bettering the life of every single American out there.

And I know you, Derek. I know that while Hillary made her case onstage last night, you’re going to be fighting just as hard to make sure that our next president is a person who believes in listening to people -- not insulting them.

Hillary made us proud last night. Let’s make sure she knows that we’re all standing with her. That no matter what offensive, outrageous nonsense Trump keeps throwing at her, we’re going to have her back. **Chip in $1 now to tell her so -- and to guarantee that we have enough in our pocket to fight for her all fall long (when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thanks):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY0NDczMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMTU0MzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Let’s do this,

Robby

name: Randi Weingarten
subject: Ken Burns and Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Senator Ron Johnson thinks educators can be replaced by videotapes. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44f2/1c469400/74c0f2d/3577840/2647593864/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/aft-rdf?utm_source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&utm_campaign=aft&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson _actually_ said this: "If you want to teach the Civil War across the country, are you better off having...tens of thousands of history teachers that kind of know the subject, **or would you be better off popping in 1 4 hours of Ken Burns's Civil War tape**...?"
\- Senator Ron Johnson Leave it to someone from a party led by a reality TV star to confuse videotape with the learning experience of a classroom. Ken Burns's masterful documentary, "The Civil War," opened the lens to history, explained its relevance, and helped it resonate with Americans across generations. But his documentary simply cannot replace teachers, like Ron Johnson -- a sitting United States senator! -- has suggested. It's just ludicrous. **[Join me and send this message loud and clear to Senator Ron Johnson: Videotapes are no substitute for educators in the classroom.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44f2/1c469400/74c0f2d/3577840/2647593864/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/aft-rdf?utm_source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&utm_campaign=aft&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44f2/1c469400/74c0f2d/3577840/2647593864/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/aft-rdf?utm_source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&utm_campaign=aft&utm_medium=ema") Education happens when teachers listen to students and encourage them to think critically. For years, educators have used Ken Burns's documentary as a supplement or a tool in the classroom -- _not to replace the teacher._ **Senator Johnson just proved, yet again, how truly out-of-touch he is. But this is typical for a party with an education agenda as outdated as Senator Johnson's Blockbuster Video card.** **[Senator Johnson suggested videotapes could replace educators in the classroom. He's out of line. Add your name if you agree, and help me send him a message he can't ignore.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44f2/1c469400/74c0f2d/3577840/2647593864/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/aft-rdf?utm_source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&utm_campaign=aft&utm_medium=ema")** Fortunately, we can get Senator Johnson out of the Senate this November by electing Russ Feingold. Russ knows that a quality education starts with listening to teachers and parents, and working together to find solutions. Russ has always stood with educators, and that's why I'm proud to stand with him. Thanks, Randi Weingarten
President, American Federation of Teachers | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44f2/1c469400/74c0f2d/3577840/2647593864/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/aft-rdf?utm_source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&source=ema_2016-09-06_aft&utm_campaign=aft&utm_medium=ema")

name: Cody
subject: Win a dinner with Tim Phillips!
body:
I know youre busy right now, but September is a big month here at Americans for Prosperity, and I need your help! Weve set ambitious citizen contact goals as we continue to spread the word to fellow Virginians about the Path to Prosperity plan.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

I know you're busy right now, but September is a big month here at Americans for Prosperity, and I need your help! And AFP President Tim Phillips needs a friend to join him for dinner!

We've set ambitious citizen contact goals as we continue to spread the word to fellow Virginians about the Path to Prosperity plan. PLUS, we're helping out other key states as they educate citizens about big-government-loving politicians who want higher taxes and more burdensome regulations.

Join me at any of our events this month and you'll be on the front lines of the fight for the American Dream. But it ALSO means that you could win dinner with AFP President Tim Phillips! That's because this month's top five activists and their significant others will get to join me, State Director Tyler Foote, and Tim for a special dinner. The contest runs from now through October 2nd, so sign up to participate in one (or more) of our events today!

**Saturday Days of Action** Saturday, September 10, 17, 24, and October 1
9:30AM-6:30PM
Sterling Office **Thursday Night Phone Banks** Thursday, September 8, 22, and 29
5-8:30PM
Sterling Office RSVP for any of the events by calling [571-271-3178](tel:571-271-3178) or emailing [cholt@afphq.org](mailto:cholt@afphq.org). Tim says he's excited to get to know the top activists in the region, but wants to make sure we go someplace that has a great dessert menu! Trust me-you don't want to miss this dinner!

Can't make it out for any of the events but still want to participate? Contact me for more ways to get involved!

See you soon!

Cody Holt
NOVA Field Director

With two months left, we're in top gear. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTQ3OTYzMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMDU5NDA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, **As of tomo rrow, there are just 60 days left until Election Day.** We are moving our efforts into top gear. No one is assuming that Jay will cruise to victory on November 8th. name: Ben Ray
subject: On trade, Evan puts Indiana first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50487/7be36b49/1ef2ea2d/78f88c6e/3977618732/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- Indiana needs a senator who does right by us on trade. That's _not_ Congressman Todd Young.
* Young took large donations from Carrier -- the company that shipped jobs out of Indiana
* Not surprisingly, he voted _twice_ to continue giving tax breaks to companies that ship jobs overseas
* And he's refused to help workers displaced by trade, saying he's "philosophically opposed" to job training assistance.

It's clear that Todd Young won't protect Indiana's interests. **[Will you chip in $5 to support Evan Bayh, who's always put Indiana workers and businesses first?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50487/7be36b49/1ef2ea2d/78f88c6d/3977618732/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=20160908nd&amount=10")**

Evan's message is simple: We need to get tough on trade.**Evan won 't accept any trade deals that don't benefit Indiana workers. **He'll fight hard to end tax breaks for corporations that ship jobs overseas. And he supports job training assistance for workers whose jobs are lost -- because it's the right thing to do.

**Evan 's not beholden to special interests or companies who would sell out our jobs. His only boss is the people of Indiana. **

**[Pitch in $5 now to help elect Evan, who's tough on trade and will fight for Hoosiers.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50487/7be36b49/1ef2ea2d/78f88c6d/3977618732/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=20160908nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:

body:
Hillary needs you to step up. | Derek --

Last night, during the Commander-in-Chief Forum on live national television, Donald Trump kicked off his evening by lying to the American people about his position on the Iraq War -- and no one stopped to call him on it.

Not only did the moderator, Matt Lauer, fail to fact-check Trump -- he then kept the conversation moving.

The worst part is, there's nothing new about this happening. We all know that Trump lies a lot. And we all know that many outlets in the press apparently lack the wherewithal to call him out -- and help voters understand that what they're hearing from Trump isn't just normal political talk, but an unprecedented descent into unqualified nonsense from a major-party presidential nominee.

At this point, we should understand that we just can't sit around and wait for fact checkers in the media to keep Trump honest.

We have to step up and do it ourselves. No one will do it for us. And the outcome of the election could hang in the balance.

That means we have to work even harder to get the facts out there on TV, online, and in conversations with voters across the country. We have to speak so loudly that every voter in America hears us. And we have to recommit ourselves to delivering Trump a definitive rebuke on November 8th.

**That takes resources. But it's vital work. If you want to join us and help hold Trump's feet to the fire, we’ll send you a free sticker when you chip in right now:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0NTUzMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMjgwMTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| **DEVELOPING:** We just learned that our Republican opponent has released a _signaling memo_ instructing outside groups getting ready to run 'independent' attack ads against us. **[Urgent rapid response funds are needed to make sure we are ready for what's coming our way. ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a1a/70cdc2ba/4714b568/3974937/642741432/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em090816_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Urgent+rapid+response+funds+are+needed+t&utm_campaign=em090816_1&source=em090816_1")** Friend,

Sadly, this is what elections too often become. Millions of dollars of attack ads funded by outside Super PACs and billionaires can drop into an election at any time.

With just 60 days to go, Chris' opponent is trying to create a game-changing moment right here in Maryland.

The target of her memo could be any of a number of billionaires or extreme right wing groups that oppose Chris for his strong stand on the issues that matter to all of us -- the NRA, the Koch brothers, Citizens United. The possibilities are endless -- but the result is the same.

body:
A few letters to Hillary... | Derek --

I work on the correspondence team here at HFA -- my job is to go through some of the mail that comes in for Hillary and make sure it gets to the right person.

And we get A LOT of mail!
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY0NTU1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMjgxMjI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY0NTU1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMjgxMjI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

I like to pull out my favorites each week to show to my team: sweet letters from little girls practicing their handwriting, funny notes from longtime supporters, tearjerkers from people Hillary has helped throughout her life. Anything that might inspire my coworkers or remind them why we’re here. I’ve been doing this since day one -- the team has loved it.

So starting this week, we want to share some of the best reads with you -- “Letters to Hillary” is ready for you to enjoy!

As we get to the home stretch of an election season that has sometimes felt a little less than inspiring, I’m so excited to share these letters with you. I think you -- and every Hillary supporter you share this with! -- are going to find something that makes you smile, tugs at your heartstrings, and reminds you why we're all working so hard to elect Hillary.

Be one of the first people to take a look, then pick your favorite and share it with a friend. You absolutely won’t regret it:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY0NTU1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxMjgxMjI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!

Vernessa

clean_body: A few letters to Hillary... | Derek -- I work on the correspondence team here at HFA -- my job is to go through some of the mail that comes in for Hillary and make sure it gets to the right person. And we get A LOT of mail! I like to pull out my favorites each week to show to my team: sweet letters from little girls practicing their handwriting, funny notes from longtime supporters, tearjerkers from people Hillary has helped throughout her life. Anything that might inspire my coworkers or remind them why we’re here. I’ve been doing this since day one -- the team has loved it. So starting this week, we want to share some of the best reads with you -- “Letters to Hillary” is ready for you to enjoy! As we get to the home stretch of an election season that has sometimes felt a little less than inspiring, I’m so excited to share these letters with you. I think you -- and every Hillary supporter you share this with! -- are going to find something that makes you smile, tugs at your heartstrings, and reminds you why we're all working so hard to elect Hillary. Be one of the first people to take a look, then pick your favorite and share it with a friend. You absolutely won’t regret it: Thanks!
